headline: Q1 Research Tools & Consumables Earnings Review: First Prize Goes to Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT)
summary: Looking back on research tools & consumables stocks’ Q1 earnings, we examine this quarter’s best and worst performers, including Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) and its peers.
